title: King Cole Big Value Chunky - Black 554
features: CREATE PROJECTS FAST: The chunky weight of this yarn means your needles will fly, allowing you to complete cosy jumpers, blankets, and accessories in a fraction of the time. Enjoy the satisfaction of a finished project sooner.

WONDERFULLY SOFT & GENTLE: Made from 100% premium acrylic, this yarn is incredibly soft to the touch, making it perfect for items worn directly against the skin. It offers the warmth and comfort of wool without any of the itch.

EFFORTLESS CARE: Keep your handmade creations looking their best with minimal fuss. This durable yarn is conveniently machine washable and can be tumble-dried, making it the ideal choice for everyday wear, children's clothes, and home accessories.

EXCEPTIONAL VALUE & VERSATILITY: As the name suggests, Big Value Chunky offers fantastic quality at an affordable price. With an extensive palette of beautiful colours, you can find the perfect shade for any project, from vibrant toys to classic garments.

RELIABLE & CONSISTENT STITCHING: This yarn provides excellent stitch definition, helping your textured patterns and cables to stand out beautifully. Whether you're a beginner or an expert, you can rely on a smooth, consistent finish every time.
description: Discover why King Cole Big Value Chunky is a firm favourite for knitters and crocheters. This wonderfully soft and versatile yarn is crafted from 100% premium acrylic, offering outstanding quality and performance at an economical price. Its chunky weight allows for impressively quick results, perfect for creating cosy sweaters, warm blankets, stylish scarves, and hats in no time at all. Available in a vast range of beautiful colours, you'll find the perfect shade for any design you can imagine. Best of all, garments and accessories made from King Cole Big Value Chunky are fully machine washable and can be tumble dried, making it a practical and durable choice for everyday items and cherished gifts.
